Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: We need to create a Log Skeleton for the described process The constraints should be based on typical order fulfillment logic We need to infer constraints from the description

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Activities RO CA RI PI QC PO GSL D IC RP

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Lets describe typical order fulfillment 1 Receive Order RO start 2 Check Availability CA after RO 3 Reserve Items RI after CA 4 Pick Items PI after reserving 5 Quality Check QC after picking 6 Pack Order PO after QC 7 Generate Shipping Label GSL after packing 8 Dispatch D after label 9 Invoice Customer IC after dispatch 10 Record Payment RP after invoice

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The process appears linear so each activity likely occurs exactly once per order

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: We can assume standard full process RO to CA to RI to PI to QC to PO to GSL to D to IC to RP

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: For always before if an activity occurs then its predecessor must have occurred earlier so CA requires RO RI requires CA PI requires RI QC requires PI PO requires QC GSL requires PO D requires GSL IC requires D RP requires IC

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: For always after if an activity occurs then the next logical step must occur later so RO leads to CA CA leads to RI RI leads to PI PI leads to QC QC leads to PO PO leads to GSL GSL leads to D D leads to IC IC leads to RP

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Given no info about variability it is safe to set each activity frequency to 1

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Equivalence is not clearly needed and never together is not clearly needed because no alternative branches are described

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Directly follows can be set for each consecutive pair because the process is modeled as a strict sequence

Name: Validation - PE
Text: The dictionary will have equivalence empty always before with consecutive predecessor pairs always after with consecutive successor pairs never together empty activ freq each equal to 1 and directly follows for each consecutive pair
